name: Waldine's Creole Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Potatoes; peel, dice, and cook
1 pound Smoked turkey sausage; slice and sauté for 5 minutes, then drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
3. Sprinkle the top with paprika and garnish with some pimiento-stuffed olive halves.
